amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 16 — paragraph 1 — point j
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 16 — paragraph 1 — point j

## Text proposed by the Commission

(j) upon request of a national competent authority, demonstrate the conformity of the high-risk AI system with the requirements set out in Chapter 2 of this Title.

(j)

(j)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

(j) upon a reasoned request of a national supervisory authority, demonstrate the conformity of the high-risk AI system with the requirements set out in Chapter 2 of this Title.

upon request of a national competent authority, demonstrate the conformity of the high-risk AI system with the requirements set out in Chapter 2 of this Title.

upon a reasoned request of a national supervisory authority, demonstrate the conformity of the high-risk AI system with the requirements set out in Chapter 2 of this Title.

(j)

(j)
